synopsis: Gorga may want to call off the hit—the target being his father-in-law and Gorga's wife being suddenly pregnant and all—but Boba Fett was promised a contract, and he doesn't do last-minute cancellations. It's a knockdown, drag-out roustabout in Boba Fett: Murder Most Foul!
title: Boba Fett: Murder Most Foul
